title: Dimeff
compiled_truth: Dimeff is an external contact at [Haas](companies/haas). Over the corpus period (1999-10-25 to 2001-08-25), Dimeff sent 12 and received 55 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eveningmba](people/eveningmba-haas) (6), [Dasovich](people/dasovich-haas) (2), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Keffer](people/keffer-haas) (1), [Bruce](people/bruce-haas) (1).
